T0007.title: Carding Shop
T0007.definition: An online marketplace, evolved from early game card trading platforms, where vendors sell virtual goods and services such as social media accounts, invitation codes, software keys, and fraud tools, acting as an intermediary for illicit transactions.
T0007.description: An online marketplace, evolved from early game card trading platforms, where vendors sell virtual goods and services such as social media accounts, invitation codes, software keys, and fraud tools, acting as an intermediary for illicit transactions.

references.title: The Scale of Black and Gray Markets: Transaction Networks Built on Card Issuing Platforms
